series_metadata.series_title: Employee Early Retirement Files and Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Files include but are not limited to PERS Retirement Plan Statement of Cost to Employer and Cover Letter, PERS Retirement Incentive Plan (Employee and Employers agreement, Employee notice of Retirement Letter, Information on Special Handling of Employee''s pay check and W-2, Cobra-Eligibility Notification, Basic/Supplemental/Independent Life Insurance Confirmation of Eligibility for conversion, Employee Benefit Information, Retirement Incentive Survey.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: one year in office Plan ends
